description: Style Note Lightweight and soft, inner wear from chromozome epitomises comfort Fit and takes care of individual requirements with a lot of variety. Ensuring that you are relaxed inside and look good outside, these are stylish necessities that you shouldn't do without. Product Details Ink blue boxer briefs, has a soft elasticated waistband with branding on it, tagless comfort and double layered pouch Material and Care 96% cotton and 4% lycra Machine wash warm Tumble dry medium Do not iron on print Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
